project.title: UX Roadmap 2026
project.description: Foundry VTT Lancer system UX improvements from the 2026 UX pass. Tracks releases v2.12.11 through v2.20.0 (optional v3.0.0).

labels.name: ux/epic
labels.description: Roadmap epic or release milestone issue

milestones.title: v2.12.11 — Trust & polish
milestones.description: Quick wins: import errors, WIP cleanup, cloud spinner, chat layout, HUD drag fix.

milestones.title: v2.13.0 — Combat loop
milestones.description: Auto-damage prompt, Acc/Diff disclosure, combat tour, chat rerolls.

milestones.title: v2.14.0 — Import & equip
milestones.description: Pilot cloud wizard, empty slot picker, unified import dialog.

milestones.title: v2.15.0 — Sheet IA
milestones.description: Pilot defaults, mech stat sections, NPC tabs.

milestones.title: v2.16.0 — A11y & dialogs
milestones.description: Collapse a11y, action manager labels, DialogV2, HUD focus trap, i18n.

milestones.title: v2.17.0 — Help & tours
milestones.description: Contextual help, what's new, tour maintenance.

milestones.title: v2.18.0 — Visual consistency
milestones.description: SCSS migration, remove legacy LCP HBS.

milestones.title: v2.19.0 — Finish stubs
milestones.description: Async loading, mount reset, combat tracker targets.

milestones.title: v2.20.0 — Interactive sheets
milestones.description: Svelte cloud island, experimental loadout editor.

milestones.title: v3.0.0 — Loadout editor GA
milestones.description: Optional major: promote loadout editor, remove legacy markup.

releases.title: v2.12.11 — Trust & polish
releases.summary: Five low-risk PRs: actionable errors, hide WIP UI, cloud download spinner, attack card layout, HUD pointer-events during drag.

releases.title: v2.13.0 — Combat loop
releases.summary: Optional auto-prompt damage, Acc/Diff progressive disclosure, combat tour update, chat reroll buttons.

releases.title: v2.14.0 — Import & equip
releases.summary: Pilot cloud wizard, empty slot affordances with compendium picker, unified import result dialog.

releases.title: v2.15.0 — Sheet information architecture
releases.summary: Pilot tab defaults, mech stats collapsible sections, NPC sheet tabs.

releases.title: v2.16.0 — Accessibility & dialogs
releases.summary: Collapse a11y, action manager labels, DialogV2 migration, HUD focus trap, Svelte HUD i18n, sheet aria audit.

releases.title: v2.17.0 — Help & discoverability
releases.summary: Contextual help links, what's new in help dialog, guided tour maintenance.

releases.title: v2.18.0 — Visual consistency
releases.summary: Inline styles to SCSS utilities; remove legacy Handlebars LCP manager.

releases.title: v2.19.0 — Finish stubs
releases.summary: Shared async loading pattern, mount reset implementation, combat tracker target controls.

releases.title: v2.20.0 — Interactive sheets (phase 1)
releases.summary: Svelte cloud import island; experimental visual loadout editor.

releases.title: v3.0.0 — Loadout editor GA (optional)
releases.summary: Promote loadout editor; remove legacy Handlebars loadout if no fallback.

prs.title: Actionable import & migration errors
acceptance: Failed COMP/CON import shows reason and next step
Missing-core errors include Open LCP Manager action
GM migration warnings stay permanent; player errors are timed

prs.title: Remove live WIP surfaces
acceptance: No user-visible TODO toasts
Pilot upload WIP card hidden until implemented

prs.title: Pilot cloud download loading state
acceptance: Download button disabled with spinner during sync
Double-click cannot fire duplicate downloads

prs.title: Attack chat card layout polish
acceptance: Hit summary visible at top of card
Roll Damage CTA pinned above collapsible sections

prs.title: HUD non-interactive during canvas drag
acceptance: Cannot click HUD controls while dragging a token on canvas

prs.title: Optional auto-prompt damage after attack
acceptance: World setting defaults to off
When on and hits exist, Damage HUD opens after attack card
Cancel aborts without applying damage

prs.title: Acc/Diff HUD progressive disclosure
acceptance: Default view shows targets, totals, cover only
Advanced section for plugins and template tools
Client setting remembers per-weapon toggles

prs.title: Combat tour: attack → damage → apply
acceptance: Tour documents manual and auto-damage paths

prs.title: Restore chat reroll buttons
acceptance: Reroll available to owner/GM; hidden for others

prs.title: Pilot Cloud import wizard
acceptance: Stepped layout: Login → Select → Download/JSON
Unsynced pilots default to Cloud tab
Link to pilot-import tour

prs.title: Empty slot affordances & compendium picker
acceptance: Empty slots show drag hint
Click opens filtered compendium picker
Invalid drop explains accepted types

prs.title: Unified import result dialog
acceptance: Single DialogV2 for v2/v3/JSON success, partial, and failure

prs.title: Pilot sheet IA defaults
acceptance: Cloud tab default for unsynced pilots; dismissible Tactical banner

prs.title: Mech stats collapsible sections
acceptance: Combat vs Systems collapsible groups with sticky headers

prs.title: NPC sheet tabs
acceptance: Stats | Features | Effects tabs; feature drag-sort preserved

prs.title: Collapse accessibility
acceptance: aria-expanded, keyboard Enter/Space on collapse triggers

prs.title: Action manager accessibility
acceptance: aria-label on all actions; optional text labels via client setting

prs.title: DialogV2 migration (stabilize & repair)
acceptance: No legacy Dialog for stabilize/full repair flows

prs.title: HUD focus trap & modal behavior
acceptance: aria-modal and focus trap while HUD open; Escape still cancels

prs.title: Svelte HUD i18n
acceptance: No hardcoded English in combat HUD components

prs.title: Sheet icon aria-label audit
acceptance: Icon-only sheet controls have aria-label matching combat tracker standard

prs.title: Contextual help links
acceptance: Help links on Cloud tab, Automation settings, first Acc/Diff open

prs.title: What's new in help dialog
acceptance: Help dialog shows recent CHANGELOG entries

prs.title: Guided tour maintenance pass
acceptance: Tour selectors match new layouts; click-to-equip step added

prs.title: SCSS migration (pilot cloud, chat, mech)
acceptance: Inline style attributes replaced with SCSS utility classes

prs.title: Remove legacy LCP Handlebars manager
acceptance: Only Svelte LCP manager preloaded

prs.title: Shared async loading pattern
acceptance: Loading indicators for async ref slots and license refresh

prs.title: Mount reset implementation
acceptance: Single-mount and reset-all with confirm dialog

prs.title: Combat tracker target controls
acceptance: Target selection controls implemented per tracker TODOs

prs.title: Svelte Cloud import island
acceptance: Cloud tab hosts Svelte wizard; HBS is thin mount point

prs.title: Svelte loadout editor (experimental)
acceptance: Feature-flagged visual loadout editor on mech Loadout tab

prs.title: Loadout editor GA (optional major)
acceptance: Remove experimental flag; document breaking change if legacy loadout removed
